comment_provenance: per-axis scores AND comments are Junyan's VERBATIM five-axis red-team of the 拓荆 deep thesis (#78 chat verdict, 2026-06-14). Scores bind to the composer sheet content_lock 297c7f5804b4abdd (public/data/decision_sheets/688072_SH.json), which encodes the same red-teamed deep thesis; committed reference price 664.42 (universe_a 2026-06-12) vs the deep thesis's web ¥645 — both yield the same negative-R/R WATCH conclusion.

specificity.comment: 没停在'设备龙头很贵',而是拆到 Q1 公允价值收益、扣非、合同负债、发出商品、demo 验收周期。

falsifiability.comment: wrong-if 绑定合同负债、毛利、扣非、经营现金流、混合键合放量,后续季报能直接打脸。

valuation_discipline.comment: 比澜起更强:表观归母与清洁扣非双视角 bridge 很关键,R/R 为负的结论从模型自然推出。倍数仍是判断锚,但已经足够做研究决策。

information_increment.comment: 'Q1 表观 +488% ≠ 主业高增''FY25 全年质量反而好''订单确定性被高估'是实质增量,不是普通摘要能稳定产出的东西。

risk_identification.comment: 价格/拥挤、产业资本减持、订单兑现、毛利、现金流、二曲线期权都覆盖,而且没有 over-bear。
